tasks.name: Choose the cheapest web hosting plan with at least 50GB storage under $40/month
tasks.description: Find web hosting plans, filter for at least 50GB SSD storage, and select the cheapest plan whose monthly price is $40 or less, then proceed to the checkout summary with exactly 1 plan selected.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation menu, click on the 'Web Hosting' or 'Hosting Services' section.
On the hosting plans page, locate the storage or disk space filter in the sidebar and set the minimum storage to '50GB' (or the closest higher available option).
In the billing or pricing filter, select 'Monthly' billing if multiple billing cycles are shown.
Use the sort dropdown above the plan list to select 'Price: Low to High'.
From the sorted plans that show at least 50GB of storage, identify the plan with the lowest monthly price that is $40/month or less, and click its 'View Details' or 'Select Plan' button.

On the selected plan’s details page, choose any required configuration options with their default or lowest-cost choices (e.g., select 1 website, basic support, or similar low-tier options if prompted).
Click the 'Add to Cart' or 'Continue' button to add this hosting plan to your cart.
From the cart popup or redirect, click the 'Go to Checkout' or 'Review Order' button to reach the checkout summary page with this single hosting plan listed.

tasks.name: Request a video production quote for a 90-second promo under $8,000
tasks.description: Configure a corporate promo video project of about 90 seconds with on-site filming in New York, indicate a maximum budget of $8,000, and submit a quote request form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
From the main navigation, hover over or click on 'Media Services' and select 'Video Production' from the dropdown or submenu.
On the video production overview page, click the button or link labeled 'Request a Quote', 'Get a Quote', or similar.
In the quote form, type '90-second corporate promo video' into the project title or project description field.
In the location field, enter 'New York, NY' as the filming location and, if there is a checkbox for 'On-site filming', select it.
In the budget field, enter '8000' as the maximum budget in US dollars, or choose the closest option that is at or below $8,000 from any budget range dropdown.
If there is a video quality or resolution option, select '4K' or the highest available quality that is within your stated budget range.

Fill in the contact details section with a name (e.g., 'Alex Johnson'), a company name (e.g., 'Brightline Solutions'), and an email address (e.g., 'alex.johnson@example.com'), then click the 'Submit Quote Request' or 'Send Request' button.

tasks.name: Book the earliest 30-minute online consultation next week between 2–5 PM for website redesign
tasks.description: Schedule a 30-minute online consultation for a website redesign topic, choosing the earliest available time slot that falls next calendar week between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM, and enter company size as 11–50 employees.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on 'Consultations', 'Book a Meeting', or a similarly labeled section.
On the consultation booking page, select 'Website Redesign' or the closest matching topic from the list of consultation types.
If there is a meeting format option, choose 'Online' or 'Virtual' as the consultation type.
Use the date picker to move to next calendar week (the next week starting Monday) and view available time slots.
Within next week’s calendar view, look at the time slots between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM and select the earliest available 30-minute slot in that time range.
In the company size dropdown, select '11–50 employees' or the closest equivalent range.

Enter your name (e.g., 'Taylor Reed') and email address (e.g., 'taylor.reed@example.com') in the corresponding fields, then click the 'Confirm Booking', 'Schedule', or similarly labeled button to finalize the consultation.

tasks.name: Build a digital marketing bundle under $900/month with SEO, social media, and blog content
tasks.description: Create a monthly digital marketing service bundle that includes SEO, social media management, and blog content creation. For each service, choose the highest-tier option that keeps the total monthly cost at or below $900, then request a proposal.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
From the main navigation, click on 'Marketing Services' or 'Digital Marketing'.
On the marketing overview page, locate and click the 'Build Your Bundle', 'Customize Package', or similar configuration tool.
In the SEO section of the bundle builder, choose the most advanced SEO plan whose individual monthly price is at or below $500.

In the Social Media Management section, select the highest-tier plan that, when combined with your chosen SEO plan, keeps the running total monthly price at or below $900 (for example, choose between 'Basic', 'Standard', or 'Premium' options based on their displayed prices).

In the Blog Content or Content Creation section, choose the lowest-priced plan that still keeps at least one blog post per month included while making sure the overall total remains at or below $900/month.
Review the summary panel or bundle overview on the page and click the 'Request Proposal', 'Get This Plan', or similarly labeled button.

On the proposal request form that appears, enter a contact name (e.g., 'Jordan Lee'), company name (e.g., 'NovaTech Media'), and email address (e.g., 'jordan.lee@example.com'), then click 'Submit' or 'Send Proposal Request'.

tasks.name: Find a retail case study that uses both IT support and video production and contact sales from it
tasks.description: Locate a case study in the retail industry that involves both IT support and video production services, open it, and use the contact option on that case study page to reach sales.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on 'Case Studies' or 'Success Stories'.
On the case studies page, use the industry filter to select 'Retail' from the list of industries.
Use the service or solution filter to select both 'IT Support' and 'Video Production' so that only case studies that involve both services are shown.
From the filtered list, click the title or image of the first case study that appears.
On the case study detail page, scroll until you find a button or link such as 'Contact Sales', 'Talk to Us', or 'Request a Similar Project', and click it.

In the contact or inquiry form that opens, type a short message in the message field such as 'We are a retail company interested in IT support and video production services similar to this case study.'
Fill in your name (e.g., 'Morgan Smith') and email address (e.g., 'morgan.smith@example.com') in the appropriate fields, then click the 'Send', 'Submit', or equivalent button.

tasks.name: Save the most recent cloud backup help article to a reading list
tasks.description: Search the help center for cloud backup information, filter by the Cloud Services topic, sort articles by most recent, open the most recent cloud backup article, and add it to a reading list or favorites.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Locate the 'Help Center', 'Support', or 'Knowledge Base' link in the header or footer and click it.
In the help center search bar, type 'cloud backup' and press Enter or click the search icon.
On the search results page, use the topic or category filter to select 'Cloud Services' from the list of topics.
Use the sort dropdown to change the sorting order to 'Most Recent', 'Newest First', or the closest equivalent.
From the sorted list of articles, click on the first article title related to cloud backup.
On the article page, look for an option such as 'Add to Favorites', 'Save to Reading List', or a bookmark icon, and click it.
If a prompt appears to name a reading list or category, type 'Cloud Topics' as the list name and confirm by clicking the 'Save' or 'Add' button.

tasks.name: Submit a high-priority support ticket for an email migration issue
tasks.description: Open the support section and submit a ticket as an existing customer about an email migration issue, selecting the 'Email & Collaboration' category and a high priority with a detailed description.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, click on 'Support' or 'Customer Support'.
On the support page, click the 'Submit a Ticket', 'Open a Support Request', or similarly labeled button.
In the customer type field or dropdown, select 'Existing Customer'.
In the issue category dropdown, choose 'Email & Collaboration' or the closest matching category.
In the subject field, type 'Urgent: Email migration not completing'.

In the description or details text area, type a short description such as 'We started migrating 25 user mailboxes to your hosted email service, and the migration has stalled at 60% for over 4 hours. Please advise on next steps.'
Set the priority dropdown to 'High' or the highest available priority level, enter a contact email (e.g., 'it.admin@example.com'), and click the 'Submit Ticket' or 'Send Request' button.

tasks.name: Start a free trial of the most affordable RMM plan for at least 25 devices under $600/month
tasks.description: Compare remote monitoring and management (RMM) service plans and select the cheapest plan that supports monitoring at least 25 devices with a monthly price under $600, then start a free trial by completing the signup form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
From the main navigation, click on 'IT Services' and then select 'Remote Monitoring & Management' or 'RMM' from the submenu.
On the RMM plans page, use any device-count filter to set the minimum number of devices to '25' or the closest available option above 25.
Use the sort dropdown to sort the available RMM plans by 'Price: Low to High'.
From the sorted list, identify the first plan that supports at least 25 devices and has a displayed monthly price under $600, then click its 'View Plan' or 'Details' button.
On the plan details page, click the 'Start Free Trial' or 'Try It Free' button associated with this plan.
In the trial signup form, enter a full name (e.g., 'Chris Alvarez'), a company name (e.g., 'Northbridge IT'), and a business email address (e.g., 'chris.alvarez@example.com').
If there is a field for estimated number of devices, enter '25' and then click the 'Start Trial', 'Create Trial Account', or similarly labeled button to complete the trial signup.

website_type: it and media services business website
